seoTitle: Macquarie Fields vs Macquarie Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Macquarie Fields and Macquarie Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Macquarie Fields vs Macquarie Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macquarie Fields and Macquarie Hills.
heading: Macquarie Fields vs Macquarie Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macquarie Fields, New South Wales and Macquarie Hills, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macquarie Fields has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Macquarie Hills (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macquarie Fields or Macquarie Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macquarie Fields has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Macquarie Hills scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macquarie Fields scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Macquarie Hills scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macquarie Fields or Macquarie Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macquarie Fields has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
